title: At a Fast Food Restaurant 快餐店
scene: Tom和Jack在快餐店点汉堡和薯条。

lines.en: What would you like to eat, Jack?
I want a hamburger and some fries.
lines.zh: 我想要一个汉堡和一些薯条。

lines.en: Do you want a drink too?
Yes, a cola, please. What about you?
lines.zh: 是的，请来一杯可乐。你呢？

lines.en: I will have a chicken burger and a milkshake.
lines.zh: 我要一个鸡肉汉堡和一杯奶昔。

lines.en: Should we get a combo meal? It is cheaper.
lines.zh: 我们要不要点套餐？便宜一些。

lines.en: Good idea. Two combo meals, please.
Do they have toys in the kids meal?
I think so. Let me ask.
Cool! I hope it is a car!
lines.zh: 太酷了！希望是个小汽车！
